settings.heading: Fabric Care Kit
settings.subheading: Precision-engineered formulas for canvas, knit, mesh, and delicate fabrics. Clean deeply without damaging fibers.

settings.heading: Mesh-Safe Cleaning
settings.text: Lift dirt from knit and mesh uppers without fraying or discoloring delicate threads.

settings.heading: Canvas & Fabric Ready
settings.text: Breaks down grime on canvas and woven fabrics while keeping the original texture intact.

settings.heading: Stain-Fighting Power
settings.text: Targets stubborn marks on fabric uppers with a balanced, sneaker-safe formula.
